summary.task: MInDS-14 en-US tool/intent identification, support/eval-separated 2x2 factorial (instruction x cards)
summary.note: Cards are built ONLY from the card-pool split (disjoint from eval; CARD_SEED=20260711); eval rows are never used to build candidate-card text. Only 'instruction_only' may be described as zero-shot (task instruction, no examples). Supersedes scripts/repro_minds14_toolintent.py and _repro/minds14_toolintent_paired.json (both FROZEN; forensic audit INT-001/INT-007 found transductive candidate cards and a hand-assembled, non-script-produced artifact that disagreed with docs/experiment_inventory.md:86). SMOKE RUN: restricted to the first 2 classes -- pipeline sanity check only, NOT a scientific result.

label_descriptions.abroad: Tool schema card for spoken command routing. Tool name: abroad. Task type: intent. Domain: unknown. Use this tool when the user command asks for: abroad. Positive example: I'll be traveling abroad and I'd like to know if there's anything I need to do as far as notifying you that I'll be out of the country when I want to use my credit card. Positive example: card work abroad. Positive example: hello I'm calling you to see if I can use my card abroad currently I'm in Japan and I don't know if I'm able to use my card processing in some stores. Boundary note: do not choose this tool for nearby tools or intents: address.
label_descriptions.address: Tool schema card for spoken command routing. Tool name: address. Task type: intent. Domain: unknown. Use this tool when the user command asks for: address. Positive example: I want to change my address to something else I have moved and I no longer at that particular address so again I'm calling about getting a new address for updating my address rather. Positive example: hi yes I want to change my address. Positive example: change my dress. Boundary note: do not choose this tool for nearby tools or intents: abroad.

label_descriptions.abroad: Tool schema card for spoken command routing. Tool name: abroad. Task type: intent. Domain: unknown. Use this tool when the user command asks for: abroad. Positive example: hi I'm going to be leaving the country and I'm going abroad I need to make sure that my card will work or anything that I need to do to make sure does it stop working. Positive example: yes I'm going to be traveling to the United Kingdom for a couple of weeks next month I need to know if I can use my card from from my bank account while I'm in Europe. Positive example: I'm planning to go to the UK on the 16th and come back on the 24th I was wondering if my car. Boundary note: do not choose this tool for nearby tools or intents: address.
label_descriptions.address: Tool schema card for spoken command routing. Tool name: address. Task type: intent. Domain: unknown. Use this tool when the user command asks for: address. Positive example: hi I need to change my address. Positive example: hi Dan Conchas I need to register my new address with you guys so I wanted to change my address on bank account. Positive example: do I need to change my address. Boundary note: do not choose this tool for nearby tools or intents: abroad.
